name: airesearch
description: Six-lens equity research reports (Supply Chain, Fundamentals, Macro, Technicals, Sentiment, Risk Matrix) generated in one pass. Deep Dive for full reports, Snapshot for quick reads. Industry Mode for theme/industry queries with constituent data.

interface.shortDescription: Six-lens equity research: snapshot & deep dive
interface.longDescription: Ask for a quick one-screen stock snapshot or a full six-lens research report covering Supply Chain, Fundamentals, Macro, Technicals, Sentiment, and Risk Matrix. Industry Mode maps value chains for themes and materials. Every number is period-labeled and verified; no target prices, ratings, or order execution — decision-support only.
defaultPrompt: Run a six-lens deep dive on NVDA
Map the HBM industry value chain
